narrative:
Darby Township has 3,615 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.0 percentage points.
